name: WeCom Document MCP
description: Connect OpenClaw to Enterprise WeChat document capabilities with direct APIs and MCP fallback.

mode.description: Preferred transport: auto, direct, or mcp.

docUrl.description: Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint for WeCom documents.

wecomConfigPath.description: Path to the config.json written by the official WeCom OpenClaw plugin.

timeoutMs.description: Timeout hint for WeCom MCP calls.

corpid.description: Enterprise WeChat CorpID for direct document API access.

secret.description: Enterprise WeChat app secret for direct document API access.

accessToken.description: Explicit Enterprise WeChat access token for direct document API access.

accessTokenCommand.description: Shell command that outputs an Enterprise WeChat access token.

accessTokenApiUrl.description: Access token endpoint for direct Enterprise WeChat document API access.
